goals.text: Complete the April marathon in under 3 hours 55 minutes
goals.notes: Primary goal of the entire training block. She ran 4:12 last year before the injury — sub-3:55 is achievable given her current fitness.

goals.text: Return to full marathon training volume (40+ miles/week) post-race
goals.notes: Post-race phase: reintroduce bilateral squats and conventional strength work once marathon is complete.

goals.text: Maintain Bulgarian split squat at 30 lbs through marathon block
goals.notes: Maintain single-leg strength during taper — load stays, sets reduce.

goals.text: IT band fully resolved — symptom-free at 18 miles/week
goals.notes: Landmark achievement — 16 weeks of consistent glute work paid off completely.
